{{CargoClone
|name=Byakko
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=158
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Micro Incubator: Convert Blue product to Purple by + 0.3%
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Demon Minion Skin HP +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Demon Minion Skin HP +50%
|}}
